task: The mechanic fixed the car. It rattled badly before he repaired the loose part.
Anna helped her sister with homework. She always struggled with mathematics.
The cat watched the mouse from the windowsill. It darted across the floor quickly.
Mark spoke with David at the conference. He had been a keynote speaker that morning.
The waiter brought the soup to the customer. It had taken longer than expected to prepare.
Emma waved at Olivia across the street. She was wearing a bright red coat.
The bookstore owner stocked the new novel. It became a bestseller within a week.
implementations: The pronoun "It" refers to "the new novel".
The pronoun "It" refers to "the bookstore owner".

task: Julia introduced Rachel to her colleagues. She had recently joined the marketing team.
The storm damaged the roof of the house. It took weeks to fully repair the damage.
